overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a steady walk through a sunlit savanna grassland with tall golden grass and scattered acacia trees under a clear blue sky. Game controller UI elements (L3/R3 prompts) are visible at the bottom of the screen throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: open savanna grassland with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden grass in an open savanna field

entered.detail: dense field of tall golden-brown grass swaying slightly in the wind
single acacia tree with sparse green canopy
solitary acacia tree standing in the middle distance
cluster of acacia trees on the right horizon
dense line of trees marking the horizon boundary
small low-lying green shrub in the grass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through an expansive open savanna grassland covered in tall golden grass. Scattered acacia trees dot the landscape under bright midday sun, with a distant tree line visible on the horizon. The scene remains consistent throughout, with only the parallax movement of trees and grass indicating forward progression.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a vast, sun-drenched savanna that maintains a consistent sense of openness. It begins by gliding through an expansive grassland where tall golden grass sways around the camera's path. As the camera progresses, scattered acacia trees emerge from the landscape, creating a rhythmic parallax effect against the bright midday sun. The scene then extends toward the horizon, steadily approaching a distant tree line under a clear blue sky.
